SparSCit

SparSCit
  • API Reference
  • Plotting (sparscit.pl)
  • View page source

Plotting (sparscit.pl)

Visualization functions for embeddings, statistics, and comparisons. All plotting functions return a matplotlib.figure.Figure when show=False is passed, allowing further customization.

Embeddings

  • src.plotting._embeddings.embedding2d() — 2D scatter plot of an embedding

Statistics

  • src.plotting._statistics.explained_variance_ratio() — Plot explained variance ratio

  • src.plotting._statistics.depth_corr() — Plot depth-correlation

  • src.plotting._statistics.volcano_plot() — Volcano plot for differential testing

Distributions

  • src.plotting._hist.counts_histogram() — Histogram of cell counts

  • src.plotting._hist.layer_config_histogram() — Histogram of layer configuration values

Comparisons

  • src.plotting._compare.compare_categorical() — Compare categorical annotations

  • src.plotting._compare.top_markers() — Plot top marker features

  • src.plotting._compare.frequency_pie() — Pie chart of category frequencies

Heatmaps & Other

  • src.plotting._heatmap.heatmap() — Heatmap or half-circle plot

  • src.plotting._metabin.metabin() — Plot metadata bin summaries

  • src.plotting._go.goea() — Plot GO enrichment results

  • src.plotting._go.goea_tree() — Plot GO enrichment as a tree

  • src.plotting._inference.regulatory_links() — Visualize regulatory links

  • Interface (sparscit.pl.int)
